nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: LACTOBACILLUS/GANODERMA LUCIDUM FRUITING BODY/(LYCIUM CHINENSE FRUIT/LEAF)/(EUCOMMIA ULMOIDES/SASA VEITCHII LEAF)/(HOUTTUYNIA CORDATA LEAF/STEM)/(ELEUTHEROCOCCUS SENTICOSUS/PLATYCODON GRANDIFLORUS ROOT) EXTRACT/HONEY FILTRATE FERMENT
chemicalDescription: Lactobacillus/Ganoderma Lucidum Fruiting Body/(Lycium Chinense Fruit/Leaf)/(Eucommia Ulmoides/Sasa Veitchii Leaf)/(Houttuynia Cordata Leaf/Stem)/(Eleutherococcus Senticosus/Platycodon Grandiflorus Root) Extract/Honey Filtrate Ferment is the product obtained by the fermentation of a filtrate of an extract of the fruiting body of  Ganoderma lucidum ; the fruits and leaves of  Lycium chinense ; the leaves of  Eucommia ulmoides, and  Sasa veitchii; the leaves and stems of  Houttuynia cordata; the roots of Eleutherococcus senticosus and Platycodon grandiflorus; and honey; by the microorganism  Lactobacillus.
inciName: LACTOBACILLUS/GANODERMA LUCIDUM FRUITING BODY/(LYCIUM CHINENSE FRUIT/LEAF)/(EUCOMMIA ULMOIDES/SASA VEITCHII LEAF)/(HOUTTUYNIA CORDATA LEAF/STEM)/(ELEUTHEROCOCCUS SENTICOSUS/PLATYCODON GRANDIFLORUS ROOT) EXTRACT/HONEY FILTRATE FERMENT
